simpleHelp: Target setting plays a vital role in environmental action through its role in the successful execution of corporate strategies, as well as in the effective management of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities. Emissions reduction targets are not the only type of relevant targets that organizations use to drive change. Other climate-related targets can be an important element of organizations' strategy to reduce their emissions. This question increases transparency of corporate environmental commitments.

guidance.text:
General 
To correctly report the progress against a maintenance target, i.e. a target to maintain a certain level of performance (e.g. to maintain a zero waste to landfill target for 100% of sites), you should treat it as a target to be met every year. In this case, the "base year" corresponds to the base year of the target that is being maintained and "target year" corresponds to the reporting year If you are a member of the EP100 and/or EV100 initiative, you can use this question to report on your progress towards achieving your target.
If you have interim targets, use the "Add Row" function to provide details about them separately.
Target reference number (column 1) 
Select a unique target reference from the drop-down menu provided to identify this target in subsequent questions and to track progress against this target in subsequent reporting years.
Date target was set (column 2) 
Enter the date on which your company has set the target.
This must be either before or during the reporting year but cannot be after the reporting year. It also cannot be after the end date of the target.
For year-on-year rolling targets, enter the date that you first set the target. This can be before the base year.
If the target was set based on financial years, enter the date year that applies to the end of your financial year and specify this in column 18 "Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions".
If you do not know the exact date on which your company set the target, enter the end of the year that your target was set.
Target coverage (column 3) 
If your target applies to the whole organization, select "Organization-wide". Note that " organization" in this context refers collectively to all the companies, businesses, organizations, other entities or groups that are included in your consolidation boundary in 6.1.
If your target does not relate to the whole organization, select the option that best describes the coverage of the target, and provide further details in column 18 " Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions".
E.g. if your target relates applies only to your office-based operations, select "Business activity".
Target type: absolute or intensity (column 4) 
Select whether the target is an absolute or an intensity target, regardless of whether you measure it in absolute (e.g. MWh) or relative (%) values. E.g. if your target is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet, select "absolute".
Target category and metric (target numerator if reporting an intensity target) (column 5) 
Select the metric relevant to the target - for intensity targets this will be the target numerator.
Target denominator (intensity targets only) (column 6) 
This column will only appear if you selected "Intensity" in column 4 "Target type: absolute or intensity".
Select the metric denominator of your climate-related intensity target.
End date of base year (column 7) 
The base year cannot be after the reporting year.
The base year is the year against which you are comparing your target.
If you have a year-on-year rolling target, the end date of your base year will be within the previous reporting year.
If you have a maintenance target, your base year will be the same as the base year of the target that is being maintained. If your maintenance target was set without any prior increase or decrease, your base year will be the current reporting year.
If you have a target based on financial years, enter the date that applies to the end of your financial year and specify this in column 18 " Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions".
If you have a target based on average emissions over a period of time (e.g. 5-year average), enter the date that applies to the end of the average period and specify this in column 18 " Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions".
Figure or percentage in base year (column 8) 
Enter the base year value for your target. Note that this will be a percentage if you have selected any percentage option as your metric in column 5b.
E.g. if your target is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet to 60% by the end of 2021, compared with 40% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet in a base year of 2016, enter 40 in this column.
If you have a maintenance target with a base year that is the same as the reporting year, enter 0 (or 0%), as your performance for this target is reset at the beginning of every reporting year.
If reporting a net emissions target, give the net figure or percentage, i.e. total emissions after any deductions or other adjustments are made to take account of carbon credits and/or other removals.
End date of the target (column 9) 
Enter the date that the target ends. For example, if the target is to reduce methane emissions by 50% by the end of 2030, the end date is 31st December 2030.
If you have a year-on-year rolling target or maintenance target, the end date of your target will be within the reporting year.
If you have a target based on financial years, enter the date that applies to the end of your financial year and specify in the "Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions" column.
If you have a target based on an average over a period of time (e.g. 5-year average), enter the date that applies to the end of the average period and specify in column 18 "Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions".
You should not report any target that was achieved before the start of the reporting year.
Figure or percentage at end date of target (column 10) 
Enter the targeted figure or percentage value at the end date of your target.
E.g. if your target is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in your company fleet to 60% by the end of 2021, compared with 40% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet in a base year of 2016, enter 60 in this column.
If reporting a net emissions target, give the net figure or percentage, i.e. total emissions after any deductions or other adjustments are made to take account of carbon credits and/or other removals.
Figure or percentage in reporting year (column 11) 
Enter the reporting year value for your target.
E.g. if your target is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in your company fleet to 60% by the end of 2021, compared with 40% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet a base year of 2016, and in the reporting year you have achieved 55% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet, enter 55 in this column.
If reporting a net emissions target, give the net figure or percentage, i.e. total emissions after any deductions or other adjustments are made to take account of carbon credits and/or other removals.
% of target achieved relative to base year (column 12) 
This column will be auto-calculated.
The target's percentage completion compared with the base year will be calculated from the "Figure or percentage in base year" (column 8), "Figure or percentage at end of target " (column 10), and the "Figure or percentage in reporting year" (column 11) columns. Ensure you have entered data into these columns.
((Figure or percentage in reporting year)-Figure or percentage in base year))/( (Figure or percentage at end date of target)-(Figure or percentage in base year) )*100% 
E.g. if your target is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in your company fleet to 60% by the end of 2021, compared with 40% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet in a base year of 2016, and in the reporting year you have achieved 55% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet, this column will display 75, as you have achieved 75% of your targeted % increase in low-carbon vehicles compared with the base year.
Negative values indicate that you have made negative progress towards your target. E.g. in the above example, that you have reduced the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet, when compared with the base year.
Values greater than 100% indicate that you have exceeded your target.
Target status in reporting year (column 13) 
New - Select this option for targets that have been set in the reporting year and are still in progress.
Underway - Select this option for targets that were set before the reporting year, with an end date in the future, that have not been achieved and continue to be pursued.
Achieved - Select this option for targets which have been achieved or exceeded in the reporting year.
Achieved and maintained - Select this option for targets that are in place to maintain a certain level of performance (e.g., to maintain zero waste to landfill for 100% of sites) and this has been achieved in the reporting year.
Expired - Select this option for targets with an end date within the reporting year, that have not been achieved or maintained and have therefore expired in the reporting year.
Revised - Select this option for targets that were set before the reporting year but a revision has been made in the reporting year, for example due to a recalculation or a change to the end date of the target. Note that the target status should be reported as "revised" only for the reporting year when the update was conducted.
Replaced - Select this option for previously reported targets that have been replaced with another target in the reporting year, for example where a facility target has been incorporated into an organization -wide target.
Retired - Select this option for targets with an end date in the future, that have not been achieved, but will no longer be pursued. Provide more information as to why this target was retired in column 18 "Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions".
Explain the reasons for the revision, replacement, or retirement of the target (column 14) 
This column is only presented if you select "Revised", "Replaced", or "Retired" in response to column 13 "Target status in reporting year".
Provide details of the revisions, replacement or retirement of the target in the reporting year and the reasons for making these changes.
For SBTi-approved targets, reasons for revisions may include:
Revisions to target data (e.g. recalculation of base year emissions due to divestment, acquisition, mergers, change in boundary, including changes in consolidation approach).
Significant changes to the target data (that could compromise relevance and consistency), triggering a mandatory target recalculation (SBTi criteria 26 and 27).
Updates to the target due to 1) Triggered recalculation of the target; 2) revalidation process when submitting new targets when a company has other targets in place (e.g. due to increasing ambition, achievement of target ahead of time).
Is this target part of an emissions target? (column 15) 
If the target is part of an emissions reduction target reported in 7.53.1 or 7.53.2, please enter the emissions reduction target reference number here.
If reporting a net emissions target, indicate the gross emissions target this relates to by including the target ID reported in 7.53.1 or 7.53.2.
Is this target part of an overarching initiative? (column 16) 
If the climate-related target is part of an overarching initiative, select the initiative or select "Other, please specify" to outline the initiative.
"No, it's not part of an overarching initiative" cannot be selected in conjunction with any other response options.
Science Based Targets initiative official validation letter (column 17) 
This column is only presented if any "Science Based Targets initiative" option is selected in column 16 "Is this target part of an overarching initiative?".
Attach your Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) validation letter.
Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions (column 18) 
If the target does not apply to the whole organization (i.e. the target coverage is not " Organization-wide"), provide further details of your target coverage in this column. E.g. if you have selected "Country/area/region" in column 3, please specify which countries/areas/regions your target covers.
You can use this column to identify where you have a financial year or average year-based target.
If your target is part of a wider carbon neutrality goal, a regulatory requirement, or a longer-term target, you can also explain this here.
Target objective (column 19) 
Describe the strategic objective for the target and how it links to your strategy. E.g. the objective of the target may be to meet a regulatory target or reduce the costs of compliance with an emissions trading scheme.
Plan for achieving target, and progress made to the end of the reporting year (column 20) 
This column is only presented if "Underway", "Revised", or "New" is selected in column 13 "Target status in reporting year".
Describe:
How you plan to achieve the target, including any current and anticipated direct or indirect mitigation and adaptation efforts, and list the actions which have contributed most to any progress towards the target;
Any planned milestones you have to monitor progress towards achieving your target;
How the latest international agreement on climate change, including jurisdictional commitments that arise from that agreement, has informed the target; and
The process(es) you use for reviewing the target.
If your target includes the use of carbon credits, include details on:
the extent to which and how carbon credits are planned to be used;
the type of credit, if available;
which scheme will certify credits bought, if planned; and
planned use of credits at the target year, if available.
Specify any other metrics you use, aside from percentage of target achievement, to monitor target progress and performance.
If possible, specify your anticipated and/or observed progress curve in this column, i.e.:
Linear - the rate of progress towards the target is anticipated and/or observed to be steady over time
Logarithmic - the rate of progress towards the target is anticipated and/or observed to be faster at the start
Exponential - the rate of progress towards the target is anticipated and/or observed to be faster at the end
Variable - the rate of progress towards the target is anticipated and/or observed to change from year to year
If you are not on track to achieve the target, explain how you plan to get back on track.
List the actions which contributed most to achieving this target (column 21) 
This column is only presented if "Achieved" or "Achieved and maintained" is selected in column 14 "Target status in reporting year".
Note for oil and gas and coal sector: 
If you have a methane-specific emissions reduction target that was not reported in 7.53.1/7.53.2, provide details of your methane-specific emissions reduction target in this question by selecting "Methane reduction target" in column 5 "Target type: category & metric (target numerator if reporting an intensity target)".
Select "Cubic meters of gas flared in non-emergency flaring" to report Zero Routine Flaring targets.
guidance.textKo: 일반 To correctly report the progress against a maintenance 목표, i.e. a 목표 to maintain a certain level of performance (e.g. to maintain a zero waste to landfill 목표 for 100% of sites), you 해야 합니다 treat it as a 목표 to be met every year. In this case, the "기준연도" corresponds to the 기준연도 의 목표 that is being maintained 및 "목표 year" corresponds to the 보고연도 만약 you are a member 의 EP100 및/또는 EV100 이니셔티브, you can use this 문항 to report on your progress towards achieving your 목표. 만약 you have interim 목표, use the "Add 행" function to 세부 정보를 입력 about them separately. 목표 reference number (열 1) Select a unique 목표 reference from the drop-down menu 입력 to identify this 목표 in subsequent 문항 및 to track progress against this 목표 in subsequent 보고연도s. Date 목표 was set (열 2) Enter the date on which your company has set the 목표. This 해야 합니다 be either before 또는 during the 보고연도 but cannot be after the 보고연도. It also cannot be after the end date 의 목표. For year-on-year rolling 목표, enter the date that you first set the 목표. This can be before the 기준연도. 만약 the 목표 was set based on 재무연도s, enter the date year that applies to the end of your 재무연도 및 specify this in 열 18 "Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항". 만약 you do not know the exact date on which your company set the 목표, enter the end 의 year that your 목표 was set. 목표 coverage (열 3) 만약 your 목표 applies to the whole organization, select "Organization-wide". Note that " organization" in this context refers collectively to all the companies, businesses, organizations, other entities 또는 groups that are included in your consolidation boundary in 6.1. 만약 your 목표 does not relate to the whole organization, select the option that best 설명s the coverage 의 목표, 및 provide further details in 열 18 " Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항". E.g. 만약 your 목표 relates applies only to your office-based operations, select "Business activity". 목표 type: absolute 또는 intensity (열 4) Select whether the 목표 is an absolute 또는 an intensity 목표, regardless of whether you measure it in absolute (e.g. MWh) 또는 relative (%) values. E.g. 만약 your 목표 is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet, select "absolute". 목표 category 및 metric (목표 numerator 만약 reporting an intensity 목표) (열 5) Select the metric 관련 to the 목표 - for intensity 목표 this will be the 목표 numerator. 목표 denominator (intensity 목표 only) (열 6) This 열 will only appear 만약 you 선택 "Intensity" in 열 4 "목표 type: absolute 또는 intensity". Select the metric denominator of your climate-related intensity 목표. End date of 기준연도 (열 7) The 기준연도 cannot be after the 보고연도. The 기준연도 is the year against which you are comparing your 목표. 만약 you have a year-on-year rolling 목표, the end date of your 기준연도 will be within the 이전 보고연도. 만약 you have a maintenance 목표, your 기준연도 will be the same as the 기준연도 의 목표 that is being maintained. 만약 your maintenance 목표 was set without 하나 이상 prior increase 또는 decrease, your 기준연도 will be the current 보고연도. 만약 you have a 목표 based on 재무연도s, enter the date that applies to the end of your 재무연도 및 specify this in 열 18 " Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항". 만약 you have a 목표 based on average emissions over a period of time (e.g. 5-year average), enter the date that applies to the end 의 average period 및 specify this in 열 18 " Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항". Figure 또는 percentage in 기준연도 (열 8) Enter the 기준연도 value 귀사의 목표. Note that this will be a percentage 만약 you have 선택 하나 이상 percentage option as your metric in 열 5b. E.g. 만약 your 목표 is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet to 60% by the end of 2021, compared with 40% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet in a 기준연도 of 2016, enter 40 in this 열. 만약 you have a maintenance 목표 with a 기준연도 that is the same as the 보고연도, enter 0 (or 0%), as your performance for this 목표 is reset at the beginning of every 보고연도. 만약 reporting a net emissions 목표, give the net figure 또는 percentage, i.e. total emissions after 하나 이상 deductions 또는 other adjustments are made to take account of carbon credits 및/또는 other removals. End date 의 목표 (열 9) Enter the date that the 목표 ends. For example, 만약 the 목표 is to reduce methane emissions by 50% by the end of 2030, the end date is 31st December 2030. 만약 you have a year-on-year rolling 목표 또는 maintenance 목표, the end date of your 목표 will be within the 보고연도. 만약 you have a 목표 based on 재무연도s, enter the date that applies to the end of your 재무연도 및 specify in the "Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항" 열. 만약 you have a 목표 based on an average over a period of time (e.g. 5-year average), enter the date that applies to the end 의 average period 및 specify in 열 18 "Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항". You 해야 합니다 not report 하나 이상 목표 that was achieved before the start 의 보고연도. Figure 또는 percentage at end date of 목표 (열 10) Enter the 목표ed figure 또는 percentage value at the end date of your 목표. E.g. 만약 your 목표 is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in your company fleet to 60% by the end of 2021, compared with 40% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet in a 기준연도 of 2016, enter 60 in this 열. 만약 reporting a net emissions 목표, give the net figure 또는 percentage, i.e. total emissions after 하나 이상 deductions 또는 other adjustments are made to take account of carbon credits 및/또는 other removals. Figure 또는 percentage in 보고연도 (열 11) Enter the 보고연도 value 귀사의 목표. E.g. 만약 your 목표 is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in your company fleet to 60% by the end of 2021, compared with 40% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet a 기준연도 of 2016, 및 in the 보고연도 you have achieved 55% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet, enter 55 in this 열. 만약 reporting a net emissions 목표, give the net figure 또는 percentage, i.e. total emissions after 하나 이상 deductions 또는 other adjustments are made to take account of carbon credits 및/또는 other removals. % of 목표 achieved relative to 기준연도 (열 12) This 열 will be auto-calculated. The 목표's percentage completion compared with the 기준연도 will be calculated from the "Figure 또는 percentage in 기준연도" (열 8), "Figure 또는 percentage at end of 목표 " (열 10), 및 the "Figure 또는 percentage in 보고연도" (열 11) 열. Ensure you have entered data into these 열. ((Figure 또는 percentage in 보고연도)-Figure 또는 percentage in 기준연도))/((Figure 또는 percentage at end date of 목표)-(Figure 또는 percentage in 기준연도))*100% E.g. 만약 your 목표 is to increase the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in your company fleet to 60% by the end of 2021, compared with 40% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet in a 기준연도 of 2016, 및 in the 보고연도 you have achieved 55% low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet, this 열 will display 75, as you have achieved 75% of your 목표ed % increase in low-carbon vehicles compared with the 기준연도. Negative values indicate that you have made negative progress towards your 목표. E.g. in the above example, that you have reduced the percentage of low-carbon vehicles in the company fleet, 경우 compared with the 기준연도. Values 초과 100% indicate that you have exceeded your 목표. 목표 status in 보고연도 (열 13) 신규 - Select this option for 목표 that have been set in the 보고연도 및 are still in progress. Underway - Select this option for 목표 that were set before the 보고연도, with an end date in the future, that have not been achieved 및 continue to be pursued. Achieved - Select this option for 목표 which have been achieved 또는 exceeded in the 보고연도. Achieved 및 maintained - Select this option for 목표 that are in place to maintain a certain level of performance (e.g., to maintain zero waste to landfill for 100% of sites) 및 this has been achieved in the 보고연도. Expired - Select this option for 목표 with an end date within the 보고연도, that have not been achieved 또는 maintained 및 have therefore expired in the 보고연도. Revised - Select this option for 목표 that were set before the 보고연도 but a revision has been made in the 보고연도, for example due to a re계산 또는 a change to the end date 의 목표. Note that the 목표 status 해야 합니다 be 보고 as "revised" only 에 대한 보고연도 경우 the update was conducted. Replaced - Select this option for previously 보고 목표 that have been replaced with another 목표 in the 보고연도, for example 여기서 a facility 목표 has been incorporated into an organization -wide 목표. Retired - Select this option for 목표 with an end date in the future, that have not been achieved, but will no longer be pursued. Provide more information as to why this 목표 was retired in 열 18 "Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항". Explain the reasons 에 대한 revision, replacement, 또는 retirement 의 목표 (열 14) This 열 is only presented 만약 you select "Revised", "Replaced", 또는 "Retired" in response to 열 13 "목표 status in 보고연도". 세부 정보를 입력 의 revisions, replacement 또는 retirement 의 목표 in the 보고연도 및 the reasons for making these changes. For SBTi-approved 목표, reasons for revisions may include: Revisions to 목표 data (e.g. re계산 of 기준연도 emissions due to divestment, acquisition, mergers, change in boundary, 포함 changes in consolidation approach). Significant changes to the 목표 data (that could compromise relevance 및 consistency), triggering a mandatory 목표 re계산 (SBTi 기준 26 및 27). Updates to the 목표 due to 1) Triggered re계산 의 목표; 2) revalidation 프로세스 경우 submitting 신규 목표 경우 a company has other 목표 in place (e.g. due to increasing ambition, achievement of 목표 ahead of time). Is this 목표 part of an emissions 목표? (열 15) 만약 the 목표 is part of an emissions reduction 목표 보고 in 7.53.1 또는 7.53.2, please enter the emissions reduction 목표 reference number here. 만약 reporting a net emissions 목표, indicate the gross emissions 목표 this relates to by 포함 the 목표 ID 보고 in 7.53.1 또는 7.53.2. Is this 목표 part of an overarching 이니셔티브? (열 16) 만약 the climate-related 목표 is part of an overarching 이니셔티브, select the 이니셔티브 또는 select "Other, 직접 입력" to outline the 이니셔티브. "No, it's not part of an overarching 이니셔티브" cannot be 선택 in conjunction with 하나 이상 other response options. Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 official validation letter (열 17) This 열 is only presented 만약 하나 이상 "Science Based 목표 이니셔티브" option is 선택 in 열 16 "Is this 목표 part of an overarching 이니셔티브?". Attach your Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 (SBTi) validation letter. Explain 목표 coverage 및 identify 제외사항 (열 18) 만약 the 목표 does not apply to the whole organization (i.e. the 목표 coverage is not " Organization-wide"), provide further details of your 목표 coverage in this 열. E.g. 만약 you have 선택 "Country/area/region" in 열 3, 직접 입력 which countries/areas/regions your 목표 covers. You can use this 열 to identify 여기서 you have a 재무연도 또는 average year-based 목표. 만약 your 목표 is part of a wider carbon neutrality goal, a regulatory requirement, 또는 a longer-term 목표, you can also explain this here. 목표 objective (열 19) 설명 the strategic objective 에 대한 목표 및 how it links to your 전략. E.g. the objective 의 목표 may be to meet a regulatory 목표 또는 reduce the costs of compliance with an emissions trading scheme. Plan for achieving 목표, 및 progress made to the end 의 보고연도 (열 20) This 열 is only presented 만약 "Underway", "Revised", 또는 "신규" is 선택 in 열 13 "목표 status in 보고연도". 설명: How you plan to achieve the 목표, 포함 하나 이상 current 및 anticipated direct 또는 indirect mitigation 및 adaptation efforts, 및 list the actions which have contributed most to 하나 이상 progress towards the 목표; 하나 이상 planned milestones you have to monitor progress towards achieving your 목표; How the latest international agreement on climate change, 포함 jurisdictional commitments that arise from that agreement, has informed the 목표; 및 The 프로세스(es) you use for reviewing the 목표. 만약 your 목표 includes the use of carbon credits, include details on: the extent to which 및 how carbon credits are planned to be used; the type of credit, 만약 available; which scheme will certify credits bought, 만약 planned; 및 planned use of credits at the 목표 year, 만약 available. Specify 하나 이상 other metrics you use, aside from percentage of 목표 achievement, to monitor 목표 progress 및 performance. 만약 possible, specify your anticipated 및/또는 observed progress curve in this 열, i.e.: Linear - the rate of progress towards the 목표 is anticipated 및/또는 observed to be steady over time Logarithmic - the rate of progress towards the 목표 is anticipated 및/또는 observed to be faster at the start Exponential - the rate of progress towards the 목표 is anticipated 및/또는 observed to be faster at the end Variable - the rate of progress towards the 목표 is anticipated 및/또는 observed to change from year to year 만약 you are not on track to achieve the 목표, explain how you plan to get back on track. List the actions which contributed most to achieving this 목표 (열 21) This 열 is only presented 만약 "Achieved" 또는 "Achieved 및 maintained" is 선택 in 열 14 "목표 status in 보고연도". Note for oil 및 gas 및 coal sector: 만약 you have a methane-specific emissions reduction 목표 that was not 보고 in 7.53.1/7.53.2, 세부 정보를 입력 of your methane-specific emissions reduction 목표 in this 문항 by selecting "Methane reduction 목표" in 열 5 "목표 type: category & metric (목표 numerator 만약 reporting an intensity 목표)". Select "Cubic meters of gas flared in non-emergency flaring" to report Zero Routine Flaring 목표.

guidance.text:
Maintenance target : a target to maintain a certain level of performance, such as the level of emissions reductions achieved after meeting a near-term target (e.g., a target to maintain a 90% reduction in scope 1+2 emissions compared to the base year). 
Year-on-year rolling target : a target to achieve a certain level of performance every year (e.g., a target to reduce scope 1 emissions by 5% compared to the previous year).
guidance.textKo: Maintenance 목표: a 목표 to maintain a certain level of performance, such as the level of emissions reductions achieved after meeting a near-term 목표 (e.g., a 목표 to maintain a 90% reduction in scope 1+2 emissions compared to the 기준연도). Year-on-year rolling 목표: a 목표 to achieve a certain level of performance every year (e.g., a 목표 to reduce Scope 1 배출량 by 5% compared to the previous year).

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
All of the following met - 3.5 points
'Targets to reduce methane emissions' selected in 7.54 AND
Any of the following selected in column ‘Target type: category & metric (target numerator if reporting an intensity target)'
- 'cubic meters of methane vented'
- 'cubic meters of methane leaked'
- 'cubic meters of methane flared'
- 'Total methane emissions in m3'
- 'Total methane emissions in CO2e'
- 'Methane leakage rate (%)'
- 'Other methane reduction target, please specify'
AND
'Yes, both non-emergency and emergency flaring' selected in 'Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities' 7.63 AND
Any of the following selected in column 'Target type: category & metric (target numerator if reporting an intensity target)'
- 'Total cubic meters of gas flared'
- 'Cubic meters of gas flared in non-emergency flaring'
- 'Total emissions associated with flaring in CO2e'
- 'Other flaring reduction target, please specify'
AND
Table completed (excluding column 'Target coverage') AND
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year' in at least one row
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
A maximum of 3.5/3.5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
All of the following met - 2 points
‘Targets to reduce methane emissions' selected in 7.54 AND
Any of the following selected in column ‘Target type: category & metric (target numerator if reporting an intensity target)'
- 'cubic meters of methane vented'
- 'cubic meters of methane leaked'
- 'cubic meters of methane flared'
- 'Total methane emissions in m3'
- 'Total methane emissions in CO2e'
- 'Methane leakage rate (%)'
- 'Other methane reduction target, please specify'
AND
'Yes, only emergency flaring' OR 'No, we do not use flaring' selected in 'Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities' of 7.63 AND
Table completed (excluding column 'Target coverage') AND
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year' in at least one row
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
All of the following met - 1 point
'Targets to reduce methane emissions' NOT selected in 7.54 AND
'Yes, both non-emergency and emergency flaring' selected in 'Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities' 7.63 AND
Any of the following selected in column 'Target type: category & metric (target numerator if reporting an intensity target)'
- 'Total cubic meters of gas flared'
- 'Cubic meters of gas flared in non-emergency flaring'
- 'Total emissions associated with flaring in CO2e'
- 'Other flaring reduction target, please specify'
AND
Table completed (excluding column 'Target coverage') AND
Any of the following selected in column 'Target status in reporting year' in at least one row
- 'New'
- 'Underway'
- 'Achieved'
- 'Revised'
- 'Achieved and maintained'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
'Targets to reduce methane emissions' NOT selected in 7.54 AND
'Yes, only emergency flaring' selected in column 'Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities' in question 7.63 - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE E)
'Targets to reduce methane emissions' NOT selected in 7.54 AND
'No, we do not use flaring' selected in column 'Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities' in question 7.63 - 0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

simpleHelpKo: 목표 setting plays a vital role in environmental action through its role in the successful execution of corporate strategies, as well as in the effective 관리 of dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회. Emissions reduction 목표 are not the only type of 관련 목표 that organizations use to drive change. Other climate-related 목표 can be an important element of organizations' 전략 to reduce their emissions. This 문항 increases transparency of corporate environmental commitments.
